summary: App UI update to ensure the Privacy Policy link is accessible by adding a top-right Settings button/entry point.
architectural_notes: Ensure Privacy Policy link is reachable via a clearly visible Settings entry point (top-right button).
known_issues: Users report there is no visible Settings tab/section in the current UI.

existing_features.title: Add a new Settings button in the app header (top-right area) alongside the existing Theme and Language buttons.

When the Settings button is clicked/tapped, open a settings popup/panel that includes a clearly visible "Privacy Policy" link that opens https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy in a new tab/window.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add a Settings button in the top-right corner so users can access the Privacy Policy link from there.
Keep the existing footer "Privacy Policy" link as-is; the new Settings entry point must be an additional way to access the same URL.

projectName: Add top-right Settings button that exposes Privacy Policy link
